messages.message: React Hook React.useEffect has a missing dependency: 'props'. Either include it or remove the dependency array. However, 'props' will change when *any* prop changes, so the preferred fix is to destructure the 'props' object outside of the useEffect call and refer to those specific props inside React.useEffect.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [props, props.valueFormatter]

suppressedMessages.message:
A method that is not declared with `this: void` may cause unintentional scoping of `this` when separated from its object.
Consider using an arrow function or explicitly `.bind()`ing the method to avoid calling the method with an unintended `this` value. 
If a function does not access `this`, it can be annotated with `this: void`.
